item.title: 亚马逊网络服务的好处 | Benefits of Amazon Web Services
item.description:
便于使用
每个服务都有自己的控制台，它提供分步说明来帮助您快速配置资源。 如果您愿意，可以使用 API 创建脚本来自动执行常见任务，例如启动新实例。

全球基础设施
该基础架构使客户能够在本地部署其应用程序并将数据存储在世界各地。 将资源放在靠近用户的位置可确保低延迟和高性能。

安全
您可以使用 AWS 托管的安全服务来监控您的数据、应用程序和资源是否存在潜在风险。 令人难以置信的多样化工具
可以使用的工具包括数据库、分析引擎、搜索引擎、计算能力、云存储设备等等？ 你的名字，他们可能有它。 可用资源的绝对数量和种类使该平台对几乎所有软件开发人员都很有用。

可扩展性
亚马逊云服务非常适合希望有效管理增长或希望避免购买昂贵硬件的企业。 亚马逊网络服务 (AWS) 提供的资源可以随着需求的变化而扩大或缩小，以帮助降低成本。 这对于具有不可预测工作负载的企业特别有用，例如提供软件即服务 (SaaS) 产品的企业

无服务器应用
无服务器计算使您能够构建可扩展的物联网、移动和 Web 应用程序平台后端，而无需考虑像亚马逊简单存储服务这样的服务器。 使用无服务器应用程序，您可以快速部署代码以响应事件并根据需求自动扩展或缩减。

无限服务器容量
亚马逊网络服务 (AWS) 云技术在全球 24 个地理区域内运营 77 个可用区，并宣布计划在印度、印度尼西亚、日本、西班牙和瑞士再增加 16 个可用区和 5 个区域。

降低总拥有成本
许多公司在将应用程序迁移到云基础设施时已经看到了 AWS 降低总拥有成本 (TCO) 的好处。 减少的幅度可能很大：一项研究发现，迁移到亚马逊网络服务(AWS) 后五年内减少了 62%，其中包括 91% 的硬件节省和 74% 的软件节省。

快速部署
在大多数情况下，只需几分钟即可开始使用亚马逊网络服务，而建立本地 IT 基础设施则需要数周或数月。 而且由于您不必预先购买服务器或其他设备，因此您可以以最少的投资开始使用。

提高性能
借助 AWS 服务，您可以提供所需的任何资源（例如存储或计算容量），并且只需为您使用的资源付费。

可靠性
此外，AWS 云服务将其服务设计为在多个级别（例如，组件、服务器机架、网络交换机）的故障中提供高可用性和弹性。

托管 IT 服务
托管服务提供商 (MSP) 可以为企业带来诸多好处，包括可扩展性、成本效益和减少内部资源负担。

随着公司的发展，IT 需求将会增加。 当企业增加新员工或扩展到 IT 需求增加的新市场时，这些需求会变得尤为明显。 这是因为 MSP 通常具有较低的间接成本，因为它们不需要自己的办公空间或设备。 此外，使用 MSP 意味着您无需雇用和培训自己的 IT 专业人员。

许多小公司可能没有足够的预算来吸引和留住 IT 领域的顶尖人才。 结论
在一天结束时，您可以选择在 AWS 上启动您的产品或服务，或者在内部运行您的软件。 它取决于多种因素，包括产品复杂性、技术要求、公司文化和财务状况。 如果您想发展您的组织，云计算可能非常适合您。 以随用随付模式部署应用程序比以往任何时候都更容易，可扩展性触手可及。 请记住，在外部硬盘驱动器或其他存储设备上维护数据的物理备份仍然很重要。

来源链接



原文:

Ease of Use
AWS cloud service provider is designed with ease of use at the forefront. Each service has its console, which provides step-by-step instructions to help you configure resources quickly. AWS also offers a variety of SDKs for popular programming languages, as well as command-line tools for configuration and deployment. If you prefer, you can use the APIs to create scripts that automate common tasks like spinning up new instances.

There are also many partner solutions available in the AWS Marketplace that provide additional functionality for your applications and infrastructure.

Global Infrastructure
AWS has a global infrastructure that is broken down into regions and availability zones. This infrastructure gives customers the ability to locally deploy their applications and store data in locations across the world. Having resources located close to users ensures low latency and high performance.

Security
AWS cloud provides you with the security tools needed to help protect your data, applications, and infrastructure. Amazon’s highly available and scalable architecture can help mitigate threats. You can use AWS-managed security services to monitor your data, applications, and resources for potential risks. AWS also offers tools like private clouds and virtual private networks (VPNs) to help you keep sensitive information protected.

Incredibly Diverse Array of Tools
Not only does the AWS cloud-based platform offers a plethora of services for you to use in creating your applications, but there are also over 70 different services available for you to use! Tools that can be used include databases, analytics engines, search engines, compute power, cloud storage devices, and more? You name it, they probably have it. The sheer number and variety of resources available make this platform useful to pretty much every software developer out there.

Scalability
Amazon cloud services are perfect for businesses that want to manage growth effectively or want to avoid buying expensive hardware. The resources offered by amazon web services (AWS) can be scaled up or down as requirements change to help reduce costs. This is particularly helpful for businesses with unpredictable workloads like those offering Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) products

Serverless apps
Serverless computing enables you to build scalable IoT, mobile, and a web application platform backend without thinking about servers like amazon simple storage service. With serverless apps, you can quickly deploy code to respond to events and automatically scale up or down based on demand.

Unlimited Server Capacity
AWS cloud services let you provision as much or as little capacity as you want to support your application needs at any time. The amazon web services (AWS) cloud technology operates 77 Availability Zones within 24 geographic Regions around the world, with announced plans for 16 more Availability Zones and five more Regions in India, Indonesia, Japan, Spain, and Switzerland.

Lower TCO
Many companies are already seeing the AWS benefits of the lower total cost of ownership (TCO) when they move their applications to the cloud infrastructure. The reductions can be significant: one study found that moving to amazon web services (AWS) resulted in a 62 percent reduction in five years, including savings of 91 percent on hardware and 74 percent on software.

Fast deployment
In most cases, it takes only minutes to get started with the amazon web service, compared with the weeks or months required to set up an on-premises IT infrastructure. And because you don’t have to purchase servers or another equipment upfront, you can get started with a minimal investment.

Improved performance
The AWS global infrastructure allows you to scale your resources up or down quickly and easily, so you can run your applications at optimum levels at all times. With AWS services, you can provide whatever resources you need (such as storage or compute capacity) and only pay for what you use.

Reliability
AWS data centers are built with redundant power supplies, backup generators, and multiple network connections for maximum reliability. In addition, AWS cloud services has designed its services to provide high availability and resiliency from failures at multiple levels (e.g., component, server rack, network switch).

Managed IT Services
Managed service providers (MSPs) can provide numerous benefits for businesses, including scalability, cost-effectiveness, and a reduction in the burden on internal resources.

As a company grows, IT needs are going to increase. These needs can become especially apparent when a business is adding new employees or expanding into new markets with increased IT requirements. MSPs can provide support at scale to ensure that a company’s IT needs are always being met.

MSPs are also often more cost-effective than hiring an internal IT department. This is because MSPs usually have lower overhead costs, as they do not require their own office space or equipment. Also, using an MSP means that you don’t need to hire and train your own IT professionals.

Many small companies may not have the large budgets necessary to attract and retain top talent from the IT field. An MSP allows these companies to gain access to high-quality expertise without going through the process of hiring and training the personnel themselves.

Conclusion
At the end of the day, you can choose to launch your product or service on AWS or run your software in-house. It depends on a variety of factors including product complexity, technical requirements, company culture, and financials. If you want to grow your organization, cloud computing could be a good fit for you. It’s easier than ever to deploy applications in a pay-as-you-go model with scalability at your fingertips. Just remember that it’s still important to maintain physical backups of your data on an external hard drive or other storage devices.

Source link

item.title: 控制您网站 AWS 上的传入流量 | Control your incoming traffic on your website AWS
item.description:
阿拉文德·库马尔·维穆拉

发表于您可以使用负载均衡器控制网站上的流量。

什么是负载均衡器？
负载均衡器在多个可用区中的多个 EC2 实例之间分配传入的应用程序流量。 这增加了应用程序的容错能力。

开始使用

让我们开始创建一个 EC2 实例

现在打开 Amazon EC2 控制台

现在在左侧菜单中，在 Instances 下选择一个实例

创建一个新实例并在配置页面下，您将看到实例编号输入2（我们正在创建两个具有相同配置的实例）

启动您的实例
完成您刚刚启动了 2 个实例。

让我们创建 TargetGroups

现在在左侧菜单中，在负载均衡下选择 TargetGroups

创建一个新的目标组

在实例下选择您的 2 个实例并将它们添加到待处理实例，然后单击创建目标组。

完成你刚刚创建了一个目标组

让我们创建一个负载均衡器

现在在左侧菜单中，在负载均衡下选择一个负载均衡器

创建新的负载均衡器

在安全组下选择您为实例提供的组

在 Targetgroup 下选择您刚刚创建的 Target Group。

在底部单击创建负载均衡器

完成 您刚刚创建了一个负载均衡器

现在转到实例页面并单击您的第一个实例。

现在单击连接并使用 EC2 实例连接，单击连接。


现在你会看到一个 Linux 控制台会弹出

现在我们需要在您的实例中加载一个示例网站，因为我们需要在您的控制台中访问 root 类型：这将移动到根目录

现在按照代码片段：

 yum update -y # it will update the system yum install httpd -y # it will install the Apache Hypertext transfer protocol server program systemctl start httpd # It will start the server cd /var/www/html/ # After install httpd you will see the html directory where we can add our html pages which will be displayed on the brower nano index.html # it will create a index.html file in html folder

将此 HTML 数据添加到您的 index.html 文件

<html> <head> <title> Welcome to server 1 </title> </head> <body> <h1>Welcome to AWS praticse web page</h1> </body> </html>

保存文件并输入此命令

systemctl enable httpd # server will be enable and it runs continuously

现在转到您的实例并选择您的第一个实例。 在底部，您将看到公共地址，复制该地址并将其粘贴到新选项卡中，您将看到标题为 Welcome to server 1 的示例网页，主要内容为 Welcome to AWS practice web page。

现在对另一个实例重复相同的过程在 index.html 文件中将标题更新为 Welcome to server 2

您可以拥有相同的标题，但是，在这里可以看到加载网页时正在运行的实例现在在左侧菜单中，在负载均衡下选择目标组并选择您的 TG 在底部，您将看到两个实例都是健康的。

现在转到负载均衡器并选择您的负载均衡器。 在底部，您将看到 DNS 名称复制该 URL 并将其粘贴到新选项卡中



刷新您的页面，您会注意到每次实例都在更改。

每次刷新都可以看到网页标题在变化。

这就是我们可以通过在每次刷新时交换实例来控制 Web 流量的方式。

注意：您需要在两个实例中保留相同的代码。

如果您有更多用户并且您的 CPU 超过 80%，您需要使用自动缩放。

我将写一篇关于自动缩放什么是 CPU 移动到 80% 的新文章……

我是 AWS 的初学者。 如果你觉得文章有问题，你可以评论它。 所以，我可以提高自己。

这仅用于测试一段时间后您可以删除您的实例。 如果您将其保持活跃几天，它可能会在练习删除您的实例后向您收费。

感谢您阅读文章……

adithyasrinivasan - adithyasrinivasan - Apr 2 4月2日



原文:

Aravind Kumar Vemula

Posted on Apr 27

You can control traffic flow on your website using a load balancer.

What is Load Balancer?
A load balancer distributes incoming application traffic across multiple EC2 instances in multiple Availability Zones. This increases the fault tolerance of your applications.

Get started

Let’s start creating a EC2 instance

Now open Amazon EC2 Console

Now on the left menu, under Instances choose an instance

Create a new instance and under configure page, you will see the no of instance enter 2 (We are creating two instances with the same configurations)

Launch your instance
Done You just launched your 2 instances.

Let’s create TargetGroups

Now on the left menu, under load balancing choose TargetGroups

Create a new target group

Under instances select your 2 instances and add them to pending instances and click on create target group.

Done you just created a target group

Let’s create a Load balancer

Now on the left menu, under load balancing choose a load balancer

Create a new Load Balancer

Under security groups select the group which you have given to your instances

Under Targetgroup select the Target Group that you have created just now.

At the bottom click on create a load balancer

Done You just created a Load Balancer

Now go to the instances page and click on your first instance.

Now click on connect and use EC2 instance connect, click on connect.


Now you will see a Linux console will popup

Now we need to load a sample website in your instance, for that we need root access in your console Type: This will move to the root directory

Now follow the code snippets:

yum update -y  # it will update the system
yum install httpd -y # it will install the Apache Hypertext transfer protocol server program
systemctl start httpd # It will start the server
cd /var/www/html/ # After install httpd you will see the html directory where we can add our html pages which will be displayed on the brower
nano index.html # it will create a index.html file in html folder

Add this HTML data to your index.html file

<html>
 <head>
  <title>
     Welcome to server 1
  </title>
 </head>
 <body>
    <h1>Welcome to AWS praticse web page</h1>
 </body>
</html>

Save the file and enter this command

systemctl enable httpd # server will be enable and it runs continuously

Now go to your instance and select your first instance. At the bottom you will see the public address, copy that address and paste it into a new tab you will see the sample web page with the title Welcome to server 1 and the main content as Welcome to AWS practice web page.

Now repeat the same process for the other instance In the index.html file update the title to Welcome to server 2

You can have the same title but, here are able to see which instance is running while loading a webpage Now on the left menu, under load balancing choose target groups and select your TG At the bottom, you will see that both instances are healthy.

Now go to the load balancer and select your load balancer. At the bottom, you will see the DNS name copy that URL and paste it into the new tab



Refresh your page you will notice that every time the instance is changing.

You can able see the webpage title is changing every time while refreshing.

This is how we can control web traffic by interchanging the instance for every refresh.

Note: You need to keep the same code in both instances.

If you have more users and if your CPU is more than 80% you need to use autoscaling.

I will write a new article on autoscaling what is the CPU moves to 80%…

I am a beginner at AWS. If you feel there is something wrong with the article you can comment on it. So, that I can improve myself.

** Note:
This is only for testing after some time you can delete your instance. If you keep it active for some days it may charge you so after practicing delete your Instance.

Thanks for reading the article…

adithyasrinivasan - Apr 2
item.author: lmas3009

item.title: 承诺 SEMÂNTICOS | COMMITS SEMÂNTICOS
item.description:
提交 ruim 示例❌

提交 bom 示例✅

 feat(banana): Frutas.js mudei a classe de cor da banana de amarelo para verde pois ela estava madura

壮举：（novo recurso para o usuário，não um novo recurso para script de construção）

  • 修复：（correção de bug para o usuário，não uma correção para um script de construção）
  • 文档：（mudanças na documentação）
  • 风格：（格式化，缺少分号等；没有生产代码更改）
  • 重构：（formatação、ponto e vírgula faltando 等；sem mudança de código de produção）
  • 测试: (adicionar testes ausentes, refatorar testes; sem mudança de código de produção)
  • 家务活：（atualização de tarefas grunhidas 等；sem mudança de código de produção）

    • Seguindo a documentação conventionalcommits você pode encontrar mais sobre o assunto. Seguindo a documentação contrastcommits você pode encontrar mais sobre o assunto。



    原文:

    A descrição de um commit bem estruturado consegue prevenir e corrigir possíveis bugs, e pra você que optou por usar commits semânticos eu trouxe um resumão pra sair logo do papel e botar logo em prática!

    Trago aqui exemplos claros da diferença de um bom commit e um ruim.

    exemplo de commit ruim❌

    exemplo de commit bom✅

    feat(banana): Frutas.js

mudei a classe de cor da banana de 
amarelo para verde pois ela estava madura

    O exemplo de commit bom mostra o quão importante é ter um commit descrito de forma clara e objetiva. No futuro, quando precisar alterar o método "banana" você pode estar verificando que esta alteração e entendendo o que ocorreu naquele commit.

    REGRAS DE COMMIT

    • feat: (novo recurso para o usuário, não um novo recurso para script de construção)
    • fix: (correção de bug para o usuário, não uma correção para um script de construção)
    • docs: (mudanças na documentação)
    • style: (formatting, missing semi colons, etc; no production code change)
    • refactor: (formatação, ponto e vírgula faltando, etc; sem mudança de código de produção)
    • test: (adicionar testes ausentes, refatorar testes; sem mudança de código de produção)
    • chore: (atualização de tarefas grunhidas etc; sem mudança de código de produção)

    Seguindo a documentação conventionalcommits você pode encontrar mais sobre o assunto.

item.title: 如何像 Ruby 中的方法一样访问哈希值 | How to Access Hash Values Like Methods in Ruby
item.description:
在 Ruby 中，如果您想访问对象上的方法之类的哈希值，请使用ActiveSupport::OrderedOptions 。 此类继承自Hash并提供动态访问器方法。

通常，您会使用哈希来执行此操作。

 person = { name: "Jason" , company: "Basecamp" } person [ :company ] # 'Basecamp'

使用OrderedOptions ，您可以编写

require "active_support/ordered_options" person = ActiveSupport :: OrderedOptions . new # set the values person . name = "Jason" person . company = "Basecamp" # access the values person . name # => 'Jason' person . company # => 'Basecamp'

执行

在幕后，Rails 使用 Ruby 中的元编程实现了这个特性。 它使用method_missing方法来处理方法调用。

 def method_missing ( name , * args ) name_string = + name . to_s if name_string . chomp! ( "=" ) self [ name_string ] = args . first # set the value else bangs = name_string . chomp! ( "!" ) # get the value if bangs self [ name_string ]. presence || raise ( KeyError . new ( ": #{ name_string } is blank" )) else self [ name_string ] end end end

您可以在此处阅读完整的源代码。 有关 Ruby 元编程的更多详细信息，请阅读我在Metaprogramming Ruby 2书中的笔记。

实际使用

它使用OrderedOptions来定义config.assets设置，而不是创建新的配置对象。 您可以在Github上阅读完整的源代码。

 class Railtie < :: Rails :: Railtie config . assets = ActiveSupport :: OrderedOptions . new config . assets . paths = [] config . assets . excluded_paths = [] config . assets . version = "1" config . assets . prefix = "/assets" end

现在，这并不意味着您必须用OrderedOptions的实例替换所有哈希值。 最好将它们与类似配置的对象一起使用，这通常会产生更具可读性的代码。

希望有帮助。 让我知道您对这种方法的看法。



原文:

In Ruby, if you want to access hash values like methods on an object, use ActiveSupport::OrderedOptions. This class inherits from Hash and provides dynamic accessor methods.

Typically, you'd do this with a Hash.

person = { name: "Jason", company: "Basecamp"
} person[:company] # 'Basecamp'

Using OrderedOptions, you can write

require "active_support/ordered_options" person = ActiveSupport::OrderedOptions.new # set the values
person.name = "Jason"
person.company = "Basecamp" # access the values
person.name # => 'Jason'
person.company # => 'Basecamp'

Implementation

Behind the scenes, Rails implements this feature using metaprogramming in Ruby. It uses the method_missing method to handle the method call.

def method_missing(name, *args) name_string = +name.to_s if name_string.chomp!("=") self[name_string] = args.first # set the value else bangs = name_string.chomp!("!") # get the value if bangs self[name_string].presence || raise(KeyError.new(":#{name_string} is blank")) else self[name_string] end end
end

You can read the complete source code here. For more details on metaprogramming in Ruby, read my notes of the Metaprogramming Ruby 2 book.

Real-World Usage

Propshaft is an asset pipeline library for Rails. It uses OrderedOptions to define the config.assets settings, instead of creating a new configuration object. You can read the complete source on Github.

class Railtie < ::Rails::Railtie config.assets = ActiveSupport::OrderedOptions.new config.assets.paths = [] config.assets.excluded_paths = [] config.assets.version = "1" config.assets.prefix = "/assets"
end

Now, this doesn't mean you have to replace all your hashes with instances of OrderedOptions. It's better to use them with configuration-like objects, which often results in more readable code.

Hope that helps. Let me know what you think about this approach.
item.author: software_writer

item.title: Java-如何在Word文档中添加或删除页眉和页脚 | Java-How to Add or Remove Header and Footer in Word documents
item.description:
使用 Spire.Doc for Java，您可以在 Java 应用程序的 Word 文档中添加、插入、删除或删除页眉和页脚。 在本文中，您将从以下两部分了解如何在 Word 文档中添加或删除页眉和页脚：

获取 Spire.Doc.Jar

方法一：如果您使用的是maven，您可以通过将以下代码添加到项目的pom.xml 文件中，轻松地将JAR 文件导入您的应用程序中。

 < repositories > < repository > < id > com . e - iceblue </ id > < name > e - iceblue </ name > < url > https: //repo.e-iceblue.com/nexus/content/groups/public/</url> </ repository > </ repositories > < dependencies > < dependency > < groupId > e - iceblue </ groupId > < artifactId > spire . doc </ artifactId > < version > 5.4 . 10 </ version > </ dependency > </ dependencies >

方法2 ：如果你不使用maven，可以从这个链接下载JAR文件，解压zip文件，然后将lib文件夹下的Spire.Doc.jar文件作为依赖导入到你的项目中。

在 Word 文档中添加页眉和页脚

创建一个 Document 实例并使用Document.loadFromFile()方法加载一个示例 Word 文档。

  • 使用Document.getSections().get()方法获取第一部分。
  • 使用section.getHeadersFooters().getHeader()方法获取页眉和section.getHeadersFooters().getFooter()方法获取页脚。
  • 使用header.addParagraph()方法将段落添加到标题。
  • 使用headerParagraph.appendPicture()方法插入图像作为标题并设置图像的位置。
  • 使用headerParagraph.appendText()方法插入文本作为标题并设置文本格式。
  • 使用footer.addParagraph()方法将段落添加到页脚。
  • 使用footerParagraph.appendField()方法将 Field_Page 字段和 Field_Num_Pages 字段添加到页脚段落并设置它们的格式。
  • 使用Document.saveToFile()方法将文档保存到另一个文件。
    •  import com.spire.doc.* ; import com.spire.doc.documents.* ; import com.spire.doc.fields.DocPicture ; import com.spire.doc.fields.TextRange ; public class insertHeaderFooter { public static void main ( String [] args ) throws Exception { //Create a Document instance Document document = new Document (); //Load a sample Word document document . loadFromFile ( "Sample.docx" ); //Get the first section Section section = document . getSections (). get ( 0 ); //Call insertHeaderAndFooter method to add header and footer to the section insertHeaderAndFooter ( section ); //Save the document to another file document . saveToFile ( "output/HeaderAndFooter.docx" , FileFormat . Docx ); } private static void insertHeaderAndFooter ( Section section ) { //Get header and footer from a section HeaderFooter header = section . getHeadersFooters (). getHeader (); HeaderFooter footer = section . getHeadersFooters (). getFooter (); //Add a paragraph to header Paragraph headerParagraph = header . addParagraph (); //Insert a picture to header paragraph and set its position DocPicture headerPicture = headerParagraph . appendPicture ( "Logo.png" ); headerPicture . setHorizontalAlignment ( ShapeHorizontalAlignment . Left ); headerPicture . setVerticalOrigin ( VerticalOrigin . Top_Margin_Area ); headerPicture . setVerticalAlignment ( ShapeVerticalAlignment . Bottom ); //Add text to header paragraph TextRange text = headerParagraph . appendText ( "Demo of Spire.Doc" ); text . getCharacterFormat (). setFontName ( "Arial" ); text . getCharacterFormat (). setFontSize ( 10 ); text . getCharacterFormat (). setItalic ( true ); headerParagraph . getFormat (). setHorizontalAlignment ( HorizontalAlignment . Right ); //Set text wrapping style headerPicture . setTextWrappingStyle ( TextWrappingStyle . Behind ); //Set the bottom border style of the header paragraph headerParagraph . getFormat (). getBorders (). getBottom (). setBorderType ( BorderStyle . Single ); headerParagraph . getFormat (). getBorders (). getBottom (). setLineWidth ( 1 f ); //Adjust the header distance section . getPageSetup (). setHeaderDistance ( 100 ); //Add a paragraph to footer Paragraph footerParagraph = footer . addParagraph (); //Add Field_Page and Field_Num_Pages fields to the footer paragraph footerParagraph . appendField ( "page number" , FieldType . Field_Page ); footerParagraph . appendText ( " of " ); footerParagraph . appendField ( "number of pages" , FieldType . Field_Num_Pages ); footerParagraph . getFormat (). setHorizontalAlignment ( HorizontalAlignment . Center ); //Set the top border style of the footer paragraph footerParagraph . getFormat (). getBorders (). getTop (). setBorderType ( BorderStyle . Single ); footerParagraph . getFormat (). getBorders (). getTop (). setLineWidth ( 1 f ); //Adjust the footer distance section . getPageSetup (). setFooterDistance ( 70 ); } }

    从 Word 文档中删除页眉和页脚

    此示例演示如何使用 Spire.Doc for Java 删除 Word 文档中首页、奇数页和偶数页上的所有页眉和页脚。

    • 创建一个文档实例。
    • 使用Document.loadFromFile()方法加载示例 Word 文档。
    • 使用Document.getSections().get()方法获取第一部分。
    • 通过section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType()方法获取所有页眉和页脚。
    • 使用HeaderFooter.getChildObjects().clear()方法删除所有页眉和页脚。
    • 使用Document.saveToFile()方法将文档保存到另一个文件。
     import com.spire.doc.* ; import com.spire.doc.documents.* ; public class removeHeaderFooter { public static void main ( String [] args ) throws Exception { //Create a Document instance Document document = new Document (); //Load a sample Word document document . loadFromFile ( "Test.docx" ); //Get the first section Section section = document . getSections (). get ( 0 ); //Remove the header on the first page HeaderFooter header = section . getHeadersFooters (). getByHeaderFooterType ( HeaderFooterType . Header_First_Page ); if ( header != null ) header . getChildObjects (). clear (); //Remove the header on the odd pages header = section . getHeadersFooters (). getByHeaderFooterType ( HeaderFooterType . Header_Odd ); if ( header != null ) header . getChildObjects (). clear (); //Remove the header on the even pages header = section . getHeadersFooters (). getByHeaderFooterType ( HeaderFooterType . Header_Even ); if ( header != null ) header . getChildObjects (). clear (); //Remove footer on the first page HeaderFooter footer = section . getHeadersFooters (). getByHeaderFooterType ( HeaderFooterType . Footer_First_Page ); if ( footer != null ) footer . getChildObjects (). clear (); //Remove footer on the odd pages footer = section . getHeadersFooters (). getByHeaderFooterType ( HeaderFooterType . Footer_Odd ); if ( footer != null ) footer . getChildObjects (). clear (); //Remove footer on the even pages footer = section . getHeadersFooters (). getByHeaderFooterType ( HeaderFooterType . Footer_Even ); if ( footer != null ) footer . getChildObjects (). clear (); //Save the result document document . saveToFile ( "output/RemoveHeaderfooter.docx" , FileFormat . Docx_2013 ); } }

    结论

    在本文中，您学习了如何在Spire.Doc for Java的帮助下在 Word 文档中添加、插入、删除或删除页眉和页脚。 如果您有任何其他问题，请随时查看Spire.Doc 论坛。



    原文:

    Word header and footer are used to format the documents or show useful information such as the topic, page number, copywrite of the documents. With Spire.Doc for Java, you can add, insert, delete or remove header and footer in Word documents in your Java applications. In this article, you will learn how to add or remove headers and footers in Word documents from the following two parts:

    Getting Spire.Doc.Jar

    Method 1: If you are using maven, you can easily import the JAR file in your application by adding the following code to your project's pom.xml file.

    <repositories> <repository> <id>com.e-iceblue</id> <name>e-iceblue</name> <url>https://repo.e-iceblue.com/nexus/content/groups/public/</url> </repository>
</repositories>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>e-iceblue</groupId> <artifactId>spire.doc</artifactId> <version>5.4.10</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>

    Method 2: If you are not using maven, you can download the JAR file from this link, extract the zip file and then import the Spire.Doc.jar file under the lib folder into your project as a dependency.

    Add header and footer to Word document

    Spire.Doc supports to add text, images, lines and page numbers to the header or footer of a Word documents.

    • Create a Document instance and load a sample Word document using Document.loadFromFile() method.
    • Get the first section using Document.getSections().get() method.
    • Using section.getHeadersFooters().getHeader() method to get header and section.getHeadersFooters().getFooter() method to get footer.
    • Add a paragraph to header using header.addParagraph() method.
    • Insert an image as a header using headerParagraph.appendPicture() method and set the position for the image.
    • Insert text as a header using headerParagraph.appendText() method and set the text format.
    • Add a paragraph to footer using footer.addParagraph() method.
    • Add Field_Page field and Field_Num_Pages field to the footer paragraph using footerParagraph.appendField() method and set the format for them.
    • Save the document to another file using Document.saveToFile() method. 
    import com.spire.doc.*;
import com.spire.doc.documents.*;
import com.spire.doc.fields.DocPicture;
import com.spire.doc.fields.TextRange; public class insertHeaderFooter { public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception { //Create a Document instance Document document = new Document(); //Load a sample Word document document.loadFromFile("Sample.docx"); //Get the first section Section section = document.getSections().get(0); //Call insertHeaderAndFooter method to add header and footer to the section insertHeaderAndFooter(section); //Save the document to another file document.saveToFile("output/HeaderAndFooter.docx", FileFormat.Docx); } private static void insertHeaderAndFooter(Section section) { //Get header and footer from a section HeaderFooter header = section.getHeadersFooters().getHeader(); HeaderFooter footer = section.getHeadersFooters().getFooter(); //Add a paragraph to header Paragraph headerParagraph = header.addParagraph(); //Insert a picture to header paragraph and set its position DocPicture headerPicture = headerParagraph.appendPicture("Logo.png"); headerPicture.setHorizontalAlignment(ShapeHorizontalAlignment.Left); headerPicture.setVerticalOrigin(VerticalOrigin.Top_Margin_Area); headerPicture.setVerticalAlignment(ShapeVerticalAlignment.Bottom); //Add text to header paragraph TextRange text = headerParagraph.appendText("Demo of Spire.Doc"); text.getCharacterFormat().setFontName("Arial"); text.getCharacterFormat().setFontSize(10); text.getCharacterFormat().setItalic(true); headerParagraph.getFormat().setHorizontalAlignment(HorizontalAlignment.Right); //Set text wrapping style headerPicture.setTextWrappingStyle(TextWrappingStyle.Behind); //Set the bottom border style of the header paragraph headerParagraph.getFormat().getBorders().getBottom().setBorderType(BorderStyle.Single); headerParagraph.getFormat().getBorders().getBottom().setLineWidth(1f); //Adjust the header distance section.getPageSetup().setHeaderDistance(100); //Add a paragraph to footer Paragraph footerParagraph = footer.addParagraph(); //Add Field_Page and Field_Num_Pages fields to the footer paragraph footerParagraph.appendField("page number", FieldType.Field_Page); footerParagraph.appendText(" of "); footerParagraph.appendField("number of pages", FieldType.Field_Num_Pages); footerParagraph.getFormat().setHorizontalAlignment(HorizontalAlignment.Center); //Set the top border style of the footer paragraph footerParagraph.getFormat().getBorders().getTop().setBorderType(BorderStyle.Single); footerParagraph.getFormat().getBorders().getTop().setLineWidth(1f); //Adjust the footer distance section.getPageSetup().setFooterDistance(70); }
}

    Remove header and footer from Word document

    There are three kinds of headers and footers in a Word documents, on first page, on odd pages and on even pages. This sample demonstrates how to remove all the headers and footers on first page, on odd pages and on even pages in a Word document using Spire.Doc for Java.

    • Create a Document instance.
    • Load a sample Word document using Document.loadFromFile() method.
    • Get the first section using Document.getSections().get() method.
    • Get all the headers and footers by section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType() method.
    • Remove all the headers and footers using HeaderFooter.getChildObjects().clear() method.
    • Save the document to another file using Document.saveToFile() method. 
    import com.spire.doc.*;
import com.spire.doc.documents.*; public class removeHeaderFooter { public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception { //Create a Document instance Document document = new Document(); //Load a sample Word document document.loadFromFile("Test.docx"); //Get the first section Section section = document.getSections().get(0); //Remove the header on the first page HeaderFooter header = section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType(HeaderFooterType.Header_First_Page); if (header != null) header.getChildObjects().clear(); //Remove the header on the odd pages header = section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType(HeaderFooterType.Header_Odd); if (header != null) header.getChildObjects().clear(); //Remove the header on the even pages header = section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType(HeaderFooterType.Header_Even); if (header != null) header.getChildObjects().clear(); //Remove footer on the first page HeaderFooter footer = section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType(HeaderFooterType.Footer_First_Page); if (footer != null) footer.getChildObjects().clear(); //Remove footer on the odd pages footer = section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType(HeaderFooterType.Footer_Odd); if (footer != null) footer.getChildObjects().clear(); //Remove footer on the even pages footer = section.getHeadersFooters().getByHeaderFooterType(HeaderFooterType.Footer_Even); if (footer != null) footer.getChildObjects().clear(); //Save the result document document.saveToFile("output/RemoveHeaderfooter.docx", FileFormat.Docx_2013); }
}

    Conclusion

    In this article, you have learned how to Add, Insert, Remove or Delete Header and Footer in Word documents with the help of Spire.Doc for Java. If you have any other questions, please feel free to check the Spire.Doc forums.
item.author: alexis92

item.title: 第二个项目完成 | 2nd project finished
item.description:
数据移动

发表于从标题中可以看出，我已经使用 JavaScript 完成了第二个项目！ 该项目主要关注 DOM 操作和事件，您需要创建一个 Etch-a-sketch 玩具项目，该项目接受用户输入并根据用户输入创建网格（例如 4x4 网格 = 16 大小的网格，具有行和列使用 div）。 对于这个项目，可以使用几种不同的方法来创建网格（float/clear、inline-block、flexbox、CSS Grid），我使用了 CSS Grid，至少可以说是具有挑战性的。 当时我还没有学习 CSS Grid，所以它对我来说变得更加困难，但是凭借坚持和一点勇气，我设法让它发挥作用！ 当然，在 The Odin Project 社区的帮助下。

我在这个项目中学到了什么。

  • 需要学习如何有效地规划项目，而不仅仅是攻击它们（在完全不规划和过度规划之间找到平衡）。

  • 对于循环。

  • 掌握 DOM 操作。



原文:

DataMoshing

Posted on Apr 27

As you can see from the title I have finished the 2nd project using JavaScript! The folks from The Odin Project were serious about each project increasing in difficulty after each one. This project was heavily focused on DOM manipulation and events you would need to create an Etch-a-sketch toy project that takes user input and creates a grid based on the users' input (for example 4x4 grid= 16 sized grid with rows and columns using divs). For this project there were a few different methods that could be utilized that created a grid (float/clear, inline-block, flexbox, CSS Grid) I went with CSS Grid and it was challenging to say the least. I have not yet learned CSS Grid at the time so it just made it a lot more difficult for me but with persistence and a little grit, I somehow managed to make it work! With the help from The Odin Project community of course.

What I've learned doing this project.

  • CSS Grid.

  • Need to learn how to efficiently plan projects and not just attack them (Finding a balance between not planning at all and over planning).

  • For loops.

  • Getting a good grasp on DOM manipulation.
item.author: datamoshing

item.title: 在 CodeLand 2022 中占据一席之地并查看演讲者 | Grab Your Spot at CodeLand 2022 & View Speakers
item.description:
嘿开发社区！

我只是想顺便告诉你，CodeLand 2022 的注册已经正式开放——另外，演讲者已经宣布 🌈

如果您过去参加过CodeLand ，那么您会熟悉本次年度会议的目标：鼓励和激励处于职业生涯早期的软件开发人员及其拥护者。 您还会很高兴地知道，CodeLand 门票连续第三年按您的意愿付费（起价为 0 美元），并且该活动完全是虚拟的，这意味着您可以在任何地方加入乐趣互联网连接。

如果您从未参加过我们的年度会议，我们希望您在 6 月 16 日至 17 日加入我们的CodeNewbie 社区，参加您的第一个 CodeLand。 这是一个真正特别的活动，由和您一样的软件开发人员制作并为您服务。

在此处了解有关 CodeLand 2022 注册开放和演讲者公告的更多信息。



原文:

Hey DEV community!

I just wanted to stop by and let you know that registration for CodeLand 2022 is officially open — plus, speakers have been announced 🌈

If you've attended CodeLand in the past, you'll be familiar with the goal of this annual conference: to encourage and inspire early-career software developers and their champions. You'll also be pleased to know that for the third year in a row, CodeLand tickets are pay-what-you-want (starting at $0) and the event is entirely virtual, meaning you can join the fun from anywhere that you have an internet connection.

If you've never attended our annual conference, we hope you join us on June 16 & 17 on CodeNewbie Community for your first CodeLand. It's a truly special event, made by and for software developers just like you.

Angie Jones has been announced as a keynote speaker for CodeLand 2022, but stay tuned in the coming weeks for more exciting keynote announcements as well as info on interactive activities and conference details.

Learn more about the CodeLand 2022 registration opening and speaker announcements here.

item.title: 使用 Rapid miner 进行数据准备 | Data Preparation using Rapid miner
item.description:
背景与视角

杰瑞的老板要求他开发一个包含互联网用户信息的数据集。 该公司将使用这些数据来确定哪些人在使用互联网，以及公司如何能够向这组用户推销他们的服务。

数据还包含缺失值。

数据清理使我们能够以对我们有意义的方式处理这些异常。

  • 上传数据到rapid miner

  • 检查数据统计以查看缺失值

在精心准备的数据的基础上进行数据挖掘是最成功的。

登地汉典—— 米林苏亚 - 梅萨诺·贝兰特—— Sep 10 '21 21 年 9 月 10 日



原文:

Context and Perspective

Jerry is the marketing manager for a small internet design and advertising firm. Jerry's boss asks him to develop a dataset containing information about internet users. The company will use this data to determine what kinds of people are using the internet and how the firm may be able to market their services to this group of users.

Jerry has collected enough data to begin analysis, but the data needs to be Denormalized.
The data also contains missing values.

Data Scrubbing allows us to handle these anomalies in ways that make sense for us.

  • Upload data to rapid miner

  • Checking data statistics to view missing values

Data mining is most successful when conducted upon a foundation of well-prepared data.

Dendi Handian - Sep 26 '21

milindsoorya - Sep 23 '21

Mersano Berant - Sep 10 '21
item.author: designegycreatives

item.title: 音乐星期一——你在听什么？ | Music Monday — What are you listening to?
item.description:
封面图片来源： artbyjayr <3

我有相当不拘一格的口味，对任何东西都持开放态度，所以我一直很喜欢浏览这些帖子的评论部分并尝试不同的曲调。 之前我什至用分享你最喜欢的万圣节曲调开始了我自己的推荐一首歌的帖子。

考虑到这一点，我决定启动一个每周系列，人们可以在其中加入并删除他们正在收听的任何内容的链接 + 浏览其他建议。

那么，你们今天都在听什么？ 注意：您可以使用以下语法在大多数平台上嵌入指向您的歌曲的链接{% embed https://... %} 。

我期待着调到你们的曲调！



原文:

cover image credits: artbyjayr <3

There are loads of posts out there where folks have asked others' for song suggestions and urged the community to drop links to their favorite tunes. I have pretty eclectic tastes and am open to whatever, so I've always enjoyed digging through the comments section of these posts and taste-testing different tunes. I've even kicked off one of my own suggest-a-song posts previously with Share your favorite Halloween tunes.

With that in mind, I've decided to start up a weekly series where folks can chime in and drop links to whatever it is they're listening to + browse others suggestions.

So, what have y'all been listening to today? Note: you can embed a link to your song on most platform using the following syntax {% embed https://... %}.

I look forward to tuning into y'all's tunes!
item.author: michaeltharrington

item.title: 让我们使用 Discord 建立我们的团队 | Let's build our team using Discord
item.description:
斯里帕德斯

发表于您好开发人员，让我们使用不和谐建立我们的团队，这有助于响尾蛇在您的帮助下成长让我们一起在不和谐上合作，现在加入响尾蛇的官方不和谐服务器。

item.title: MiuJS：用于构建包含最少必要功能的 HTML 应用程序的框架 | MiuJS: a framework for building HTML applications packed with the minimum necessary functionality
item.description:
它不依赖于特定的前端库，如 React 或 Vue.js，但包含了尽可能多的开发所需的功能。

特征

  • 运行服务器端而不是 SSG
  • 内置控制器来处理非 GET 请求
  • 使用 Nunjucks 模板进行 HTML 优先开发，预先构建模板以避免在生产中使用fs
  • 客户端 JavaScript 包没有外部库依赖项（在生产构建中初始 5kb 或更少！）
  • 具有实时重新加载功能的内置开发服务器和具有连接功能的内置生产服务器

推荐给

  • 创建不想让客户端超载的网页
  • 非平台特定的轻量级网站
  • 带有模板的企业网站 + 少量的 POST 操作等。

不兼容

  • 大型网站和网络应用程序开发
  • 具有大量本地 Markdown 的博客和文档站点

虽然以上是一个狭隘的需求，但我相信对于那些认为现有框架过度指定的人来说，当他们想要加快一个小网站的建设时，它会很有用。
如果您有兴趣，请继续阅读。

截至 2022 年，无论语言如何，都有无数名为“Web 框架”的库和模块。
在开发产品的实际核心软件时，可能会用到 Ruby on Rails 和 Django 等大型框架。

但是，例如，如果您构建网站只是为了介绍该产品，那么这些框架会感觉设计过度。
有多种选择可以解决这个问题，但我觉得主要的问题是：

  • 我喜欢 Next.js、Remix 等使用的 React，但捆绑大小是创建小型站点时需要考虑的问题。
  • 诸如 Wordpress 之类的 CMS 也同样被过度指定，并且开始时文件太多。
  • 可以选择使用静态站点生成器（例如 Hugo），但每次更新数据时都需要构建它。

换句话说，我想要的是：

  • 需要很少或不需要开发时间
  • 体积小
  • 在服务器端运行

考虑现有选项

首先，我缩小了可以满足上述要求的框架的选择范围。

我尝试了各种小型框架，例如Sinatra和Gin ，但我觉得它们中的大多数都是基于自定义的假设，以至于它们扩展了 HTTP 路由器。

该项目的目标是开发一个小型网站。 我想要一个专门用于前端而不是可扩展性的实用程序。

因此，我决定创建我们自己的框架。

创建框架

要求

  • 能够使用具有低学习成本的模板引擎
  • 支持服务器端渲染
  • 不是静态网站生成器
  • 内置 HTTP 服务器，能够处理 POST 请求

额外的

  • 可以使用作用域 CSS，或 CSS 模块等。
  • 可以在没有 JavaScript 的情况下运行
  • 开发期间实时重新加载
  • 服务器运行时没有fs （想用 Vercel、Netlify 等运行）

我开发了一个可以尽可能满足这些需求的web框架。

缪斯

结果是 MiuJS，它满足了上述所有要求。

从项目创建到构建

由于我们的网站上有详细的使用说明，我将只提供一个简单的介绍。

创建项目

它可以通过create-miu包从 npx 创建。

 npx create-miu@latest my-project

在这个阶段，可以从内置服务器、Netlify 和 Vercel 中选择部署目标，每个目标都有 JavaScript 和 TypeScript 的模板。

发展

具有实时重新加载功能的内置开发服务器。

 yarn dev # or npm run dev

请求工作流


为每个平台创建的请求处理程序，例如createVercelRequestHandler

  • 基本上每个Route文件在MVC中都扮演着一个控制器的角色，详细的处理可以在这里描述。

    路由文件

    在src/routes下，使用了类似 Next.js 的文件系统路由，其中src/routes/index.js自动路由到/ ， src/routes/about.js到/about等等。 另外，每个Route文件都可以通过导出一个带有HTTP方法名的函数来实现。 

    •  import type { RouteAction } from " miujs/node " ; import { render , json } from " miujs/node " ; // http://localhost:3000/posts#GET export const get : RouteAction = ({ createContent }) = > { return render ( createContent ({ layout : " default " }), { status : 200 }); }; // http://localhost:3000/posts#POST export const post : RouteAction = ({ query , params }) => { console . log ( `query: ` , query ); console . log ( `params: ` , params ); return json ({}, { status : 200 }); };

    模板

    从RouteAction传递的createContent函数具有内置机制，可以使用缓存的构建后 Nunjucks 模板中的模板文件，而无需使用fs ，并且该函数可用于从指定目录生成 html 呈现的 Nunjucks。

     import type { RouteAction } from " miujs/node " ; import { render } from " miujs/node " ; export const get : RouteAction = async ({ createContent , params }) => { const data = await fetchSource ({ handle : params ! . handle }). catch (() => null ); if ( ! data ) { return render ( createContent ({ layout : " 404 " }), { status : 404 }); } return render ( createContent ({ layout : " default " , // Templates that are entry points that reference files under src/layouts sections : [ // Section name and scope variables that reference to files under src/sections { name : " header " , settings : { name : " Akiyoshi " } } ], data // Global data }), { status : 200 , headers : { " Cache-Control " : " public, max-age=900 " } } ); };
     <!-- layouts/default.njk --> <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <title> {{ data.title }} </title> </head> <body> The contents of the `sections` are compiled and inserted in the following comment fragment. <!-- content --> </body> </html>
     <!-- sections/header.njk --> <header> The `settings` scope provides access to section-specific scope variables. </header>

    作用域 CSS

    建造

    构建也可以通过一个命令完成。

     yarn build # or npm run build

    根据 miu.config.js 中描述的设置为每个服务器目标（node、netlify、vercel）构建。

    部署

    内置服务器仅适用于 Node.js，因此它可以部署到任何有 Node.js 运行时可用的环境。

     yarn serve # or npm run serve

    部署到 Vercel 或 Netlify 等使用 serverless 功能的服务需要一些棘手的配置，但create-miu包中的模板包含配置文件，因此您无需配置即可部署，除非需要特殊处理。

    未来的实现

    该框架旨在满足开发“需要服务器端但不希望像现有的全栈框架那样过度指定的小型网站”的利基需求。

    在实现必要的功能时，大部分代码，例如会话存储，都是通过从我欣赏的框架（例如 Remix）中复制部分代码来及时实现的。 由于 MiuJS 并非旨在用于开发大型应用程序，因此使用场景可能一开始就受到限制。

    如果有人符合这个狭隘的需求，如果你喜欢，请使用它。

    谢谢阅读。

    我计划重写这个区域，以便可以更简单地以类似 PHP 的方式使用它。

    塞巴斯蒂安·洛伯—— Apr 13 4月13日



    原文:

    Github

    MiuJS is a full-stack framework running on Node.js that includes utilities necessary for developing small websites.
    It does not rely on specific front-end libraries such as React or Vue.js, yet packs as many features as possible that are necessary for development.

    Features

    • Runs server-side instead of SSG
    • Built-in controller to handle non-GET requests
    • HTML-first development using Nunjucks templates, pre-built templates to avoid using fs in production
    • Scoped CSS feature, no mass production of CSS files
    • No external library dependencies for client-side JavaScript bundles (initial 5kb or less in production builds!)
    • Built-in dev server with live reload and built-in production server with connect

    Recommended for

    • Creating web pages that do not want to overload the client-side
    • Lightweight websites that are not platform specific
    • Corporate sites with templates + small amount of POST actions, etc.

    Incompatibility

    • Large scale website and web application development
    • SPA development
    • Blogs and documentation sites with large amounts of local Markdown

    Although the above is a narrow demand, I believe that it can be useful for those who fell that existing frameworks are over-specified when they want to speed up the construction of a small site.
    If you are interested, please continue reading.

    As of 2022, there are countless libraries and mods named "web frameworks" regardless of languages.
    When developing the actual core software of a product, large frameworks such as Ruby on Rails and Django may be used.

    However, if you are building a website just to introduce that product, for example, these frameworks feel over-engineered.
    There are various options to solve this, but the main issues I felt were:

    • I love React used by Next.js, Remix, etc., but the bundle size is a concern for creating a small site.
    • Sveltekit made by Svelte as well as 1.
    • CMSs such as Wordpress are similarly over-specified and have too many files to begin with.
    • There is an option to use a static site generator (e.g. Hugo), but it needs to be built every time data is updated.

    In other words, what I wanted was:

    • Requires few or no development time
    • Small in size
    • Runs on the server-side

    Considering the existing options

    First, I narrowed down our choices of frameworks that could satisfy the above.

    I tried various small frameworks such as Sinatra and Gin, but I felt that most of them are based on the assumption of customization to the extent that they extend the HTTP router.

    The goal of this project is to develop a small website. I wanted a utility that specializes in front-end rather than extensibility.

    Therefore, I decided to create our own framework.

    Create a framework

    Requirements

    • Ability to use template engines with low learning costs
    • Support for server-side rendering
    • Not a static site generator
    • Built-in HTTP server, capable of handing POST requests

    Additional

    • JavaScript bundling
    • Can use scoped CSS, or CSS modules, etc.
    • Can run without JavaScript
    • Live reload during development
    • No fs in server runtime (want to run with Vercel, Netlify, etc.)

    I have developed a web framework that can satisfy these requirements as much as possible.

    MiuJS

    The result is MiuJS, which meets all of the above requirements.

    MiuJS Website

    From project creation to build

    As detailed use is described on our website, I will only provide a simplified introduction.

    Create project

    It can be created from npx by the create-miu package.

    npx create-miu@latest my-project

    At this stage, the deployment targets can be selected from built-in server, Netlify, and Vercel, each with templates for JavaScript and TypeScript.

    Development

    Built-in dev server with live reload.

    yarn dev
# or 
npm run dev

    Request workflow


    MiuJS server requests are processed in the following order:

    • Request handlers created for each platform, such as createVercelRequestHandler
    • Function calls corresponding to request methods such as get, post described in files under src/routes
    • createServerRequest function in src/entry-server.js

    Basically, each Route file plays the role of a controller in MVC, and detailed processing can be described here.

    Route files

    Under src/routes, Next.js-like file system routing in employed, with src/routes/index.js automatically routed to /, src/routes/about.js to /about, and so on. In addition, each Route file can be implemented by exporting a function with an HTTP method name.

    import type { RouteAction } from "miujs/node";
import { render, json } from "miujs/node"; // http://localhost:3000/posts#GET
export const get: RouteAction = ({ createContent }) = > { return render(createContent({ layout: "default" }), { status: 200 });
}; // http://localhost:3000/posts#POST
export const post: RouteAction = ({ query, params }) => { console.log(`query: `, query); console.log(`params: `, params); return json({}, { status: 200 });
};

    Templating

    The createContent function passed from RouteAction has a built-in mechanism for using template files from cached post-build Nunjucks templates without using fs, and this function can be used to generate html rendered Nunjucks from the specified directory.

    import type { RouteAction } from "miujs/node";
import { render } from "miujs/node"; export const get: RouteAction = async ({ createContent, params }) => { const data = await fetchSource({ handle: params!.handle }).catch(() => null); if (!data) { return render(createContent({ layout: "404" }), { status: 404 }); } return render( createContent({ layout: "default", // Templates that are entry points that reference files under src/layouts sections: [ // Section name and scope variables that reference to files under src/sections { name: "header", settings: { name: "Akiyoshi" } } ], data // Global data }), { status: 200, headers: { "Cache-Control": "public, max-age=900" } } );
};

    <!-- layouts/default.njk -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html> <head> <title>{{ data.title }}</title> </head> <body> The contents of the `sections` are compiled and inserted in the following comment fragment. <!-- content --> </body>
</html>

    <!-- sections/header.njk -->
<header> The `settings` scope provides access to section-specific scope variables.
</header>

    Scoped CSS

    Scoped CSS can be applied to content in src/partials and src/sections with markup like Vue.js or Svelte.

    <style scoped> .price:scope { display: flex; align-items: center; }
</style> <template> <div class="price"><small>$</small>{{ price }}</div>
</template>

    Build

    Build is also completed with a single command.

    yarn build
# or 
npm run build

    Build for each server target (node, netlify, vercel) based on the settings described in miu.config.js.

    Deploy

    The built-in server works only with Node.js, so it can be deployed to any environment where the Node.js runtime is available.

    yarn serve
# or 
npm run serve

    Deploying to services that use serverless functions such as Vercel or Netlify requires some tricky configuration, but the templates in the create-miu package include configuration files, so you can deploy without configuration, except in cases where special handling is required.

    Future implementations

    This framework is intended to meet the niche demand of developing "small websites that need a server-side but do not want to be as over-specified as existing full-stack frameworks.

    In implementing the necessary functionality, most of the code, such as session storage, is implemented in time by copying parts of it from frameworks I admire, such as Remix. Since MiuJS is not intended to be used for developing large-scale applications, the usage scenario may be limited to begin with.

    If anyone matches this narrow demand, please use it if you like.

    Thanks for reading.

    MiuJS Github
    MiuJS website

    I plan to rewrite this area so that it can be used more simply in a PHP-like manner.

    Sebastien Lorber - Apr 13
